local_updates: Thunder regular season ends Apr 12; NBA Play-In runs Apr 14–17 and playoffs begin Apr 18.
Bricktown is active this week with Comets home dates Apr 7–12, including $2 Tuesday, Field Trip Day, College Thursday, Friday fireworks, Bluey Night, and Sunday all-you-can-eat.
Norman traffic and parking pressure should rise Apr 10–12 with Medieval Fair at Reaves Park.
Earth Fest returns to Scissortail Park on Apr 18 from 10AM–3PM.
OKC Memorial Marathon weekend is Apr 24–26, with expo activity Apr 24–25 at the Convention Center.
